summary: Completed comprehensive testing of StreamVault iteration 3 features. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: Admin panel with Wasabi S3 config form, moderation panel with slow mode controls, Record button on dashboard, non-admin redirect from /admin.
passed_tests: Backend API Tests (21/21 passed):
- LiveKit URL: Viewer token returns wss://stream-x9ltpoe7.livekit.cloud
- LiveKit URL: Streamer token returns wss://stream-x9ltpoe7.livekit.cloud
- Admin Panel: Non-admin gets 403 on storage config
- Admin Panel: Admin can get storage config
- Admin Panel: Admin can save S3 storage config
- Admin Panel: Admin can delete S3 storage config
- Moderation: Get mods list
- Moderation: Get mod status (is_mod, is_streamer, slow_mode)
- Moderation: Admin can ban user
- Moderation: Admin can get bans list
- Moderation: Admin can unban user
- Moderation: Admin can timeout user (60s)
- Moderation: Admin can set slow mode (0/3/5/10/30)
- Moderation: Invalid slow mode duration rejected (400)
- Moderation: Non-mod cannot ban users
- Mod Assignment: Streamer can assign mod
- Mod Assignment: Streamer can remove mod
- Recording: Start recording requires S3 config (400)
- Recording: Stop recording requires active recording (400)
- Authentication: Admin login with admin role
- Authentication: Demo user login
Frontend Tests (all passed):
- Homepage loads with live streams
- Admin login works
- Admin Panel link visible in dropdown for admin users
- Admin Panel page loads with Wasabi S3 Storage form
- S3 config form has all elements: Provider, Region, Endpoint, Bucket, Access Key, Secret Key, Save button
- Progamer login works
- Dashboard shows Stream Status: LIVE
- Dashboard shows Record button when streaming
- Dashboard shows End Stream button
- Stream page shows chat box with Mod button
- Moderation Panel shows Slow Mode controls (Off, 3s, 5s, 10s, 30s)
- Moderation Panel shows Quick Timeout options (1min, 5min, 10min)
- Moderation Panel shows Banned Users and Moderators sections
- Non-admin redirected from /admin (403 error, no admin page content)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby warning in Moderation Panel (accessibility improvement)
seed_data_creation: Demo streamers (progamer, musicqueen, chatmaster) with live streams auto-seeded on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 3 features verified working: LiveKit URL updated to wss://stream-x9ltpoe7.livekit.cloud, Admin panel at /admin with Wasabi S3 config form (CRUD working), Full moderation system (ban/unban, timeout, slow mode 0/3/5/10/30s, mod assignment), Recording start/stop endpoints (require S3 config), Dashboard Record button visible when streaming. Previous iterations 1 & 2 features still working. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_streamvault_v3.py covers all new endpoints.

livekit_url.status: VERIFIED - Both viewer and streamer tokens return correct URL

admin_panel.s3_config_form: All fields present: provider, endpoint, bucket, region, access_key, secret_key

mod_controls_ui.mod_panel_button: Visible for mods/streamers in chat header
